summary.goal: Add battle simulation view at /battles/[id] with animated HP bars and turn-by-turn playback (closes #17)
decisions: polls GET /battles/{id} until status=completed before starting animation — battle computes in milliseconds so this is almost always instant, but covers the race condition when the user is navigated here immediately after POST /battles
HP bars use CSS transition for smooth animation between turns — simpler than a JS animation loop and sufficient for 1.5s pacing
